use_cases: Ambient visual effect for hero sections
Decorative canvas animation for website backgrounds
Dynamic pixel art visualization for tech-focused interfaces
Self-animating grid effect for digital product showcases
ai_summary: A canvas-based animated pixel grid component that renders a configurable grid of pixels with randomized life cycles, opacity transitions, and optional glow effects. Individual pixels fade in and out with varying alpha values and timing, creating a dynamic ambient visual effect suitable for backgrounds or decorative purposes. The component is fully self-contained with built-in animation logic using requestAnimationFrame.
